source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The Grinder
archetype.receipt: 915 games of steady volume at 52.0% — the climb is about where the games go, not how many.

entries.change: Move the jungle games to midlane
Queue midlane instead of the usual mix
entries.receipt: 53.1% there vs 52.0% overall, 161 games of evidence
53.2% over 138 games on Kira vs 52.0% overall

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

leanInto.name: Kira

plan: Queue midlane as primary. It is Goldilocks324's best role at 53.1% over 161 games (overall is 52.0%). Set carry as secondary, not the other way around.
Comfort-hero rule for the climb: Kira. Compared with the average player on the same hero, Goldilocks324 wins about 2.8 more games per 100 on it.
Goldilocks324's champion pool is 17+ heroes wide and the top three are only 30% of the games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on the top three.
The math: Goldilocks324 is at 440 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. The all-time peak is 922 — Platinum-level rating has been touched once already; this is a consistency problem, not a ceiling problem.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward the player's own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where the player wins, not why

insights.title: Goldilocks324 wins the long game
insights.finding: Past 32 minutes Goldilocks324 wins 50% vs 33% in short games. Scaling comps and patience fit; avoid coin-flip early all-ins.
insights.receipt: wins 3 of 9 short games vs 5 of 10 long ones, recent sample

insights.title: Cuban brings out Goldilocks324's best
insights.finding: Goldilocks324's record alongside Cuban Noobster is 56% over 210 ranked games — the strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of the squad queue, make it this pair.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: 3 pentakills in real 5v5s and a longest spree of 19 (plus 2 more in ARAM and brawls — the group chat can rule on whether those count). Goldilocks324 has receipts.

insights.title: Goldilocks324's lean, relative to the squad: vision work
insights.finding: Goldilocks324's profile sits mid-pack on most axes; the clearest lean is vision work at 1.3x the squad average. Steady is a style too — the lineup can build around predictability.
